element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player races across the United States against opponents
Players must avoid police cars throughout the race
At certain points, roads fork allowing players to skip several stages
Weather changes requiring windshield wipers activation
Time changes requiring headlights activation at night

typical_relief_triggers: Navigating stage skips to reduce race length
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Continuous racing rhythm with environmental and obstacle-based tension modulation across a cross-country route

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Road forks at checkpoints indicate optional stage skips and branching paths

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction to basic racing against opponents and police evasion mechanics
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Progressive environmental challenges with weather and time-of-day system integration; strategic fork navigation for stage optimization

notable_level_patterns.description: Single continuous race across the United States with checkpoint-based progression, weather/time cycling, and police evasion throughout
At certain points in the race, road splits allow players to choose paths, enabling stage skipping as a skill-based optimization mechanic
